question: How many friends does each student have?
gold_sql: SELECT student_id ,  count(*) FROM Friend GROUP BY student_id
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_2, COUNT(T2.col_2) FROM highschooler AS T1 LEFT JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 GROUP BY T1.col_1
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_2, COUNT(T2.col_2) FROM highschooler AS T1 LEFT JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 GROUP BY T1.col_1
